key.description: Returns the key corresponding to this entry.

value.description:
Returns the value corresponding to this entry.  If the mapping
has been removed from the backing map (by the iterator's
{@code remove} operation), the results of this call are undefined.

get.description:
下载任务结果
下载Video-TS翻译任务的结果文件

application/json.example:
1
00:00:00,300 --> 00:00:03,200
Let's welcome the new couple with applause

2
00:00:08,413 --> 00:00:10,757
Brother, you're wearing a bathrobe to the wedding?

3
00:00:11,952 --> 00:00:12,678
What?

4
00:00:13,787 --> 00:00:15,530
You're really embarrassing me, An Mei Wenjiang

5
00:00:17,022 --> 00:00:19,330
Brother, we're out of the city now

6
00:00:19,450 --> 00:00:21,530
You're being too showy. I'm worried about you

7
00:00:22,380 --> 00:00:22,967
Okay

8
00:00:23,860 --> 00:00:25,216
Then I won't go down there

9
00:00:27,250 --> 00:00:29,110
Please have the new couple exchange their rings

10
00:00:44,230 --> 00:00:45,430
You're so good

11
00:00:46,985 --> 00:00:48,950
It's just that this dress doesn't really suit me

12
00:00:52,310 --> 00:00:53,450
Brother, I'll go in first to take a look

13
00:00:53,580 --> 00:00:55,000
I'll be back soon

14
00:01:05,471 --> 00:01:07,450
I heard that you're very good at painting

15
00:01:07,660 --> 00:01:11,100
Then you have to draw a picture of a wedding scene, and you can't leave until you've finished it

16
00:01:13,930 --> 00:01:14,916
You're so good

17
00:01:14,916 --> 00:01:17,150
It's completely soulless

18
00:01:17,150 --> 00:01:17,940
Boring

19
00:01:33,670 --> 00:01:35,580
The groom can now kiss the bride

20
00:01:36,440 --> 00:01:38,680
Give him/her a kiss

21
00:01:44,450 --> 00:01:45,930
I've been lucky too

22
00:01:46,940 --> 00:01:48,100
I should leave now, too

23
00:02:24,120 --> 00:02:25,120
Beautiful

24
00:02:33,640 --> 00:02:35,960
Her figure is still quite good

25
00:02:39,760 --> 00:02:40,370
Single

26
00:02:42,933 --> 00:02:43,413
Yes

27
00:02:55,290 --> 00:02:56,362
Take a nap

28
00:02:58,290 --> 00:02:58,800
What?
